comments: File a - Tracks listed are from the show but come in individual files with TV's comments. (Marked @)
Files b &c are an incomplete show. (Tracks marked $ are not on these files)
File d is a speed corrected and patched version combining the previous two sources.

sessions.artist: Wildlife recorded 1983-06-24 for Friday Rock Show
David Bowie - Tommy plays four tracks from Lifetimes a radio station only promo LP
sessions.details: Bowie had recently signed to EMI and RCA had a limited time left on their rights to his catalogue. They worked the sh*t out of his back catalogue, releasing five albums on picture disc, a special pack of 10x7" picture discs and twenty 7" singles in picture sleeves, all under the strapline “Lifetimes”
